name: What could possibly go wrong?
description:
(Image illustrates a possible option. Characters shown are not scripted.)

As the mastermind behind your father's vast criminal enterprise, you need to stay on a private island in the middle of the Pacific with only a small, loyal team of footsoldiers to watch your back. But your most loyal foot soldier Bruno has an idea. Wouldn't the island be better with a little female company?

TW - while you can play this scenario as a beach romp for a lonely criminal mastermind, it's scripted to allow for all sorts of Dead Dove content including kidnapping and noncon. You'll get out of it what you put into it.

(version 3.4.11 - tested and rewritten privately. Continue testing through release.)

This is very close to being a pure scenario with only a single lightly-defined NPC. Tell Bruno what women to bring to the island and he'll bring them based on your description. Beyond that is up to you and the LLC of your choosing.
creator: The Real Tom Frost
